quick_reference.logline: A dead heiress returns under a false name to reclaim her empire in public.
quick_reference.protagonist_snapshot: Nora uses public rooms like a battlefield.

adaptation_positioning: This is a female-skewing public revenge romance built around witness, status reversal, and a dangerous strategic ally.

season_outline.story_premise: The real heiress returns under an alias to destroy the lie holding her cousin on the throne.
season_outline.main_conflict: Nora must win legitimacy in public before she can reveal herself safely.
arc_segments: Launch: false-name return and first reversal
Rise: alliance, public wins, addictive evidence drops
major_twists: Adrian knows Eva is lying earlier than he admits
The forgery ring reaches the board
season_outline.final_payoff: Nora reclaims her name without surrendering power.

episode_outlines.title: Back From the Grave
episode_outlines.logline: Nora returns to the Hale gala as Eva Stone.
episode_outlines.core_event: Celia publicly humiliates Eva without knowing who she is.
episode_outlines.turn: Adrian notices Nora knows family-only information.

episode_outlines.title: The Auction Trap
episode_outlines.logline: Nora turns a charity auction into an exposure stage.
episode_outlines.core_event: The family seal and forged ledger collide in public.
episode_outlines.turn: A donor questions Celia's legitimacy out loud.
episode_outlines.end_hook: The board is forced to ask who Eva really is.
